message: Jake
Garrison
Oh, you are here.
Ah, I remember. You're a friend of Guy's.
Isn't that right?
It's you again. You really are a boring person.
Look
Talk

Behind the counter in front of you, there are two receptionists wearing Nets uniforms sitting.
They're pretty cute, but
their vibe is hardly different from a Playboy or Penthouse pinup.
Even though it's a major league baseball team, it's still a business. If you look behind the scenes, you'll see a business-like expression.
Their income depends on the team's wins and losses, so they must be desperate.
It's the off-season, and people rarely have business at the team office. We're the only ones in the lobby.
At first glance, he seems like a nice guy, but I can't tell what kind of true self is hidden behind that gentle face.
After all, he's a professional liar, jaded by the media.
While I wouldn't call him adorable, he has an endearing face. Thanks to this face,
he's probably gaining quite a bit.
Dressed in an orthodox brown suit with a pressed shirt. He's a completely different breed from the sweaty, clumsy players.
He seems rather suspicious.
As Ash said, I think there's a strong possibility he's hiding something.
He has a blank expression, but there's no doubt he's hiding something. I wonder if he knows where Gai is.
Hello. Since then, from Gai.
From Gai? No, no, there's absolutely nothing.
Could it be that you have something?
No, unfortunately I have nothing either.
Y-yeah, I suppose so. Goodness, Gai is really a hassle, isn't he? We're completely at a loss here.
Hahaha.
Gai is really a bother, isn't he?
Um.
Has there really been nothing from Gai?
W-wait, what exactly do you mean by that?
No, it's hard to believe that Gai would just go somewhere without saying anything to the team.
Just wait a moment. Are you saying that I’m lying?
No, that's not what I'm saying.
But that's exactly what you're implying. Seriously, I'm the one who's suffering here!
Please stop it already.
I don't have time to deal with someone just wasting time.
Do you perhaps know where Gai is headed?
W-who do you think you are to say something like that?
No, Gai's contract is about to end soon, right? I was just asking about his plans.
I lied based on what I heard from Ash.
W-what did you say!?
What have you heard from Gai?
That's not something I would discuss with you.
D-do you think you're mocking me?
What's going on today? The atmosphere feels different than usual.
Enough already! I'm trying to be friendly here, while you act like I'm some kind of villain.
I just want to know the truth.
What do you mean you want to know the truth?! Get out of here! Don't ever come back!
San
Listen, you guys at the reception, never let this man inside, understood?!
Gai is excellent as a player, but he seems to be out of touch with common sense.
He wasn't the type to do something like this.
I'm worried something has happened to him, but with no information, I have no way to search.
Honestly, I'm at my wits' end.
I really want to know what Gai has told you.
That's not fair. You know something, don't you? Maybe you're the one hiding Gai.
So, are you saying the team is keeping Gai under house arrest?
Well, I can't say for sure. But I do believe you know something.
Th-that is...
No, that's not the case.
It's unpleasant, very unpleasant.
I can't believe Gai would just abandon Kristy and go somewhere.
Could it be that he has some circumstances preventing him from coming back?
Is he already dead?
Certainly, he's a careless guy, but he wouldn't do something to make Kristy sad. I can only think that this is a serious situation.
As Ash also said, maybe the team, or at least...
...knows Gai's whereabouts?
No doubt about it, he knows something.
His attitude is suspicious. The way he occasionally glances our way is also concerning.
Could it be that this man knows where Gai has gone?
He’s friendly and cheerful, but there's something about him that I can’t trust.
In the worst case, Gai might be detained by the baseball team.
After all, he is a popular player for NETS, and it's true that his performance has improved their results.
The likelihood that Gai is being detained by the baseball team is quite high.
Since I won't be able to entertain frequent visits, feel free to come by only if something happens.
To be honest, I would prefer if you never come again.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
